CONTACT
2025

2021
2019
2017
2025
LOG // 2025.01

Venus Rover Probe

Entering the harsh atmosphere of the second planet. Concept testing and atmospheric pressure simulations completed.

2023
LOG // 2023.02

Lunar Base Architecture

Structural models for sustained human presence on the lunar south pole, focusing on radiation shielding and modular deployment.

2021
LOG // 2021.03

Orbital Visualizer

A multi-spectral visualization tool for tracking orbital debris and plotting safe trajectory corridors in low Earth orbit.

2019
LOG // 2019.04

CubeSat Build

Final assembly and systems integration of the custom 3U CubeSat structure, preparing for deployment from the ISS.

2017
LOG // 2017.05

Deep Space Comm Network

Upgrading the physical antenna arrays and signal processing pipelines for the Deep Space Network to support higher bandwidth telemetry.
System Online // 2026
